recommended_actions.action: Investigate duplicate records. Add dedup logic keyed on non-key fields.
Investigate root cause of sell_through discrepancy for 2025-12. Check for duplicate events, missing data, or filter logic differences.

top_risks.business_impact: Duplicate records inflate aggregations and distort metrics
top_risks.title: Near-duplicate rows detected

top_risks.business_impact: Reported sell_through for 2025-12 is 71.1%, but recomputed value from raw events is 64.9%. Discrepancy of +8.6%.
top_risks.title: sell_through misreported for 2025-12 (off by +8.6%)

executive_summary: BayesIQ audited this retailer's inventory and sell-through reporting pipeline. We identified 2 findings — 128 near-duplicate transaction records inflating sell-through aggregations and an 8.6% overstatement in the headline sell-through metric. The buying team was making seasonal procurement decisions based on phantom demand. After deduplication and pipeline remediation, the reliability score improved from 30 to 85.
